backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with user profiles, products, contact info, and custom orders, protected by role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that product images were removed from CuteAccessoriesPage.tsx, leaving only text-based content on product cards.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each page, component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the DESVA app with favicon, meta description, Google Fonts preloads for Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond, and Inter, and the React root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with 9 routes and React Query, wrapping all pages in SiteLayout.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Site footer fetching contact info from the backend and displaying DESVA branding, category navigation links, and Instagram/email contact details.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Layout wrapper that composes TopNav, a main content area, and SiteFooter into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/layout/TopNav.ts: Sticky top navigation bar with the DESVA brand logo, desktop nav links, and a collapsible mobile menu. Handles smooth scrolling to page sections and route navigation.
frontend/src/components/Section.tsx: Reusable Section and SectionHeader components providing consistent padding, fade-in animations, and serif typography for page sections.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage. Invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and identity state management via DFINITY's AuthClient. Exports both a provider component and a consumer hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products, contact info, and custom orders against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with a custom rose-gold/blush pastel design token palette and animation keyframes for the DESVA brand.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/BookmarkCollectionPag: Product page for customized bookmarks featuring an SVG illustration, product details, tags, pricing, and an add-to-cart button with a brief success state.
frontend/src/pages/BouquetCollectionPage: Displays a collection of bouquet types (Ribbon, Artificial, Natural, Pipe Cleaner) with variants and pricing, allowing users to add items to a local cart state.
frontend/src/pages/CustomizedCardCollect: Shows a single customized greeting card product (2-page, 4-side) with a visual mockup, pricing starting at ₹249, and an add-to-cart button with temporary feedback.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrdersPage.tsx: Renders a custom order form that collects customer details and submits the order to a backend actor via a mutation, showing a success screen with an Instagram link on completion.
frontend/src/pages/CuteAccessoriesPage.t: Lists cute accessories (earrings, keychains, scrunchies, etc.) in a grid, fetching live prices from a backend actor and falling back to default prices while loading.
frontend/src/pages/ExtraProductsPage.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the DESVA storefront landing page with a hero banner and a category grid linking to bouquets, polaroids, magazines, bookmarks, cards, and accessories collection pages.
frontend/src/pages/MagazineCollectionPag: Displays a magazine product collection page with medium/large size toggle, SVG mockups, and add-to-cart functionality for 4, 6, and 8-page magazine options.
frontend/src/pages/NewLaunchesPage.tsx: Empty file with no content — likely a placeholder for a new launches product page.
frontend/src/pages/PhotobookCollectionPa: Empty file with no content — likely a placeholder for a photobook collection product page.
frontend/src/pages/PolaroidCollectionPag: Displays individual polaroid product options (large square, medium square, rectangle) with SVG frame previews and per-piece pricing with add-to-cart buttons.
frontend/src/pages/PolaroidCollectionsPa: Displays curated polaroid set products (8-piece bouquet and 16-piece set) with stacked polaroid visual mockups and add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), brand colors (rosegold, blush, cream), shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes for the DESVA frontend.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for DESVA, tracking existing features and a pending request to remove product images from the Cute Accessories page.
